title: Acme Logistics — Cloud platform migration
purpose: Move Acme's three remaining on-prem business applications to Northwind Cloud before the data-center contract ends on 2026-12-31. Staying on-prem past that date means a forced 12-month contract renewal Acme does not want to pay for.

in_scope: Lift-and-shift of the OrderHub, Billing, and Reporting applications
Cutover runbook and rollback procedure per application
Decommissioning of the on-prem hosts after a 30-day soak
out_of_scope: The warehouse management system (separate project, ACME-WMS)

success_criteria: All three applications live on Northwind Cloud by 2026-11-15
No single cutover exceeds its agreed maintenance window
On-prem data center fully decommissioned before 2026-12-31
No P1 incidents attributable to the migration in the first 30 days

health.note: Landing-zone sign-off from the vendor is late; it gates the first cutover.

environments.name: Northwind landing zone
environments.status: build in progress — awaiting vendor sign-off

risks.description: Vendor landing-zone sign-off is late and gates the first cutover.
risks.mitigation: Weekly vendor sync with a named owner and date.

risks.description: Data-center contract auto-renews on 2026-12-31 if not decommissioned in time.
risks.mitigation: Hard backstop date tracked on the monitoring card.
